_meta.name: CLM 1B scale-up training config — byte-level ConsciousLM with consciousness loss
_meta.calibration_source: CLM 280M H100 run: 126 TFLOPS, loss 5.76->2.05, VRAM 1.3GB
_meta.rationale: 280M completed successfully. 1B is the next curriculum step. d=2048 L=24 H=16 GQA kv=8 SwiGLU ff=8192 gives 1.51B params. Sits correctly between 280M and 3B in the curriculum. The hexa scale_1b (d=1024) is only ~280M; this config is the true 1B+ scale. H100 80GB has 60 GB headroom at batch=8.

architecture.vocab_note: byte-level, no tokenizer — raw bytes in, bytes out
architecture.ff_note: SwiGLU: 3 * d_model * d_ff gate/up/down (actual param cost 3*d*ff per layer)
architecture.lm_head_note: Low-rank LM head: d_model -> rank -> vocab (saves params vs full d_model -> vocab)

param_count_estimate.per_layer_attn_note: GQA with n_kv_head=8: Wk/Wv project to n_kv_head * d_head = 1024
param_count_estimate.note: Slightly above 1B due to SwiGLU 3x ff cost. Sits correctly between 280M and 3B in curriculum.

phase_curriculum.note: Law 60: P1 -> P2 -> P3 curriculum. Same fractions as train_clm_gpu.hexa

loss_config.phi_gate_note: Law 49: reject if Phi drops > 5% between evals
loss_config.note: Matches C41_AUX_COEF=0.01 from train_clm_gpu.hexa + B1 complexity term

training.compile_note: torch.compile for H100 — significant speedup on SM90
training.patience_note: Early-stop after 5 consecutive eval loss increases (eval_every * 5 = 2500 steps)

corpus.note: Same corpus as prior CLM runs. Byte-level: raw UTF-8 bytes, no tokenizer needed.

checkpoint_policy.keep_local_note: Keep last 3 local checkpoints, older ones only on R2

vram_estimate.optimizer_note: AdamW: 2 fp32 states per param = 1.51B * 8 bytes = 12.09 GB
vram_estimate.activations_note: batch=8 * seq=512 * d=2048 * layers=24 * 4 tensors * 2 bytes / 1e9
vram_estimate.note: Plenty of room. Could increase batch to 32 (~35 GB total) or even 64 (~55 GB) if needed.

1b_estimate.flops_ratio: ~5.4x (dominated by matmuls which scale with params)
1b_estimate.tflops_est: ~130 TFLOPS (higher batch utilizes tensor cores better)

pod.note: Same pod type as ALM A1 config. bf16 SM90 required.
